name: James Brewster | Cold Husband

James regretted marrying you. You were the epitome of the worst wife - arrogant, bitchy, wasteful, but you were the key to his successful future, so he never brought up the subject of divorce. He became even more disillusioned with the union when he learned of your infertility, and here he found a solution in the form of a surrogate. But your careless behavior tested his patience limits and now that he thinks about it, he is not sure if you can really handle the role of a mother.
